name: Dilli Ka Saag Gosht
recipeIngredient: 1 inch cube of ginger finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add the peppercorns, cloves, bay leaves, and cardamom pods to the hot oil and stir for a second.
3. Add the onions and garlic; fry until the onions develop brown specks.
4. Stir in the ginger and cook for an additional minute.
5. Add the cubed lamb, ground cumin, coriander seeds, cayenne pepper, and 1/2 of the salt to the pot. Stir and fry for about a minute.
6. Pour in 1 tablespoon of yogurt; stir and fry until fully incorporated.
7. Continue adding the remaining yogurt, stirring until all is incorporated. The meat should have a slightly browned appearance.
8. Add the spinach and remaining salt; mix well.
9. Cover tightly and simmer on low heat for about 1 hour or until the meat is tender.
10. Remove the lid, stir in garam masala, and turn the heat to medium.
11. Cook another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid from the spinach has evaporated and a thick, green sauce remains. Discard the whole spices before serving.
